monster_001.lore_extended: Goblins are ubiquitous pests found in almost every corner of Eldoria. Scavengers by nature, they travel in packs and attack the weak.

item_001.lore_extended: A standard potion used by novice adventurers.

location_001.lore_extended: A calm, serene forest that is home to many wild beasts.

faction_001.lore_extended: A mysterious group that operates from the shadows.
